examples.review: But the staff was so horrible to us.
To be completely fair, the only redeeming factor was the food, which was above average, but couldn't make up for all the other deficiencies of Teodora.
The food is uniformly exceptional, with a very capable kitchen which will proudly whip up whatever you feel like eating, whether it's on the menu or not.
The lobster sandwich is $24 and although it was good it was not nearly enough to warrant that price.
Sushi wasn't anything spectacular for the price.
would have rather tried terrace in the sky or water club for that price
I had the salmon dish and while it was fine, for the price paid, I expected it to have some type of flavor.
The food is reliable and the price is moderate.
